title: QA/QC MANAGER
description:
Responsibilities

  • Develop, implement, and maintain project-specific QA/QC plans, Inspection & Test Plans (ITPs), and procedures in compliance with ISO standards and client requirements.

  • Oversee quality inspections, testing activities, and documentation across all construction phases, including civil, structural, architectural, MEP, and commissioning works.

  • Coordinate closely with internal teams, subcontractors, and consultants to ensure adherence to design specifications and industry standards (CONQUAS experience is an advantage).

  • Supervise inspection processes for material receiving, ongoing works, mock-ups, and final handover.

  • Liaise with clients, authorities, and third-party inspectors during audits and site inspections.

  • Manage non-conformance reports (NCRs), conduct root cause analysis, and implement corrective and preventive actions.

  • Ensure all quality documentation, checklists, and test records are properly maintained and submitted for handover.

  • Support commissioning and validation activities, particularly for controlled or critical environments.

  • Provide training, guidance, and oversight to site QA/QC personnel to ensure consistent quality standards.

  • Participate in risk assessments, method statement reviews, and quality-related meetings.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in engineering (Mechanical, Electronic, or Mechatronics) in a construction-related field.
  • Minimum 5 years of QA/QC experience in building or construction projects.
  • Strong understanding of ISO standards, QA/QC processes, and international quality systems.
  • Knowledge of MEP systems, containment, cleanroom classification, and critical utilities is an added advantage.
  • Proficient in documentation control, audit preparation, and quality monitoring tools.
  • Workplace safety certification (e.g. WSQ, WSH) is preferred.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office applications (Word, Excel, and PowerPoint).
  • Excellent interpersonal, communication, and collaboration skills.
  • A team player who can also work independently and effectively resolve issues in a fast-paced environment.

postedCompany.description:
Some 10 years ago, when the highly efficient and technically experienced team at Attika Interior + MEP was formed, an exciting journey of building a great company started. Attika Interior + MEP Pte Ltd is a full-service interior decoration and MEP engineering company with builders work experience.


Expertise

Our expertise and knowledge includes handling live environment projects through different phases, all aspects of fit-out and electrical works. We ensure safety on construction site and in the public areas. Our clients’ projects are in safe hands with us.


Accomplishment

Attika Interior + MEP Pte Ltd has completed a wide range of commercial projects for the retail and hospitality industries, schools, conversation project and office fit outs. Examples include Hotel Clover, Fort Canning Hotel and the Singapore Chinese Chamber of Commerce & Industry.
postedCompany.name: ATTIKA INTERIOR + MEP PTE. LTD.
